EmailTemplate.name: Contact - Send Reset Password Email
EmailTemplate.subject: Reset your Carmignac Password
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Contact.LastName} {!Contact.FirstName},
You recently requested to reset your password for your Camignac Pro Space Account, Click the link below to reset it :
https://www.carmignac.fr/en/codesforgotten
If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email.
Regards, Carmignac Team
